summary: List Budget View Snapshot Detail Rows
description:
Returns a list of all budget view snapshots detail rows for project status and ad hoc types.

Note: In addition to all the fields outlined in the response, there will be an additional key for each visible
source and formula column created for the particular budget view. As well, when using a Forecasting View ID, additional keys
will be visible that give calculated forecasts for each month, as defined by the Advanced Forecasting Tool.

parameters.name: biller[]
parameters.description: Return item(s) within a specific biller. Format is biller[]=id=1,type=SubJob or biller[]=id=1,type=Project

parameters.name: cost_code_id[]
parameters.description: Return item(s) within a specific Cost Code id or range of Cost Code IDs

parameters.name: cost_code_name[]
parameters.description: Return item(s) within a specific Cost Code name or range of Cost Code names

parameters.name: root_cost_code_id[]
parameters.description: Return item(s) within a specific Root Cost Code id or range of Root Cost Code IDs

parameters.name: root_cost_code_name[]
parameters.description: Return item(s) within a specific Root Cost Code name or range of Root Cost Code names

parameters.name: category_id[]
parameters.description: Return item(s) within a specific category id (line item type id) or range of category IDs

parameters.name: budget_line_item_id[]
parameters.description: Return item(s) within a specific budget line item id or range of budget line item IDs

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified sort. Default is biller_type,biller,root_cost_code,cost_code,category_id

parameters.name: budget_row_type
parameters.description: Return budgeted, unbudgeted or all item(s) from all budget rows for a project. Default is all. Note that when the unbudgeted or all values are supplied, the id field will be null for rows that have...

schema.description: Array of Budget View Snapshot Detail Rows

deletable.description: Indicates if the underlying Budget Line Item can be deleted

wbs_code_id.description: WBS Code ID or null if WBS information is not available

automatically_calculated.description: Indicates if the amount is the automatic_amount or the manual_amount

calculation_strategy.description: Indicates how the amount is calculated

unbudgeted_reason.description: Reason a line does not have a budget_line_item_id
